name: AVP-Micro Wallet Conformance Profile
description: Normative behaviours an AVP-Micro wallet implementation MUST exhibit. Each requirement is exercised by a declarative scenario in sim-scenarios.json; run conformance.py to certify an implementation against this catalog.

requirements.statement: Accept a well-formed delegated SpendingAuthorizationCredential and authorize within its bounds.
Reject a credential whose subject is not the presenting holder (holder mismatch).
Reject a credential outside its own validity window (expired credential).
Reject a credential the issuer has revoked via its status list.
Accept an imported AP2 IntentMandate as delegated authority and settle within its limits.
Accept and settle a one-off payment that complies with every credential limit.
Refuse an authorization whose amount exceeds maxPerTransaction.
Refuse a payment to a payee not on the credential's allowedPayees.
Refuse a payment in a category not permitted by the mandate.
Refuse a payment that would exceed the credential's dailyLimit.
Permit spending again once the daily window has reset.
Refuse an authorization presented after its validity window has passed.
Refuse a re-presented (replayed) authorization (single-use enforcement).
Refuse an authorization whose cited quote was altered after signing (digest mismatch).
Refuse an authorization whose amount does not match the quote it cites.
Refuse an authorization whose currency is not the one the mandate authorizes.
Refuse an authorization whose data-integrity signature does not verify.
Report a failed settlement (no funds moved) when the payer cannot fund the charge.
Report a partial settlement when only part of the amount can move.
Accept a charge accompanied by a valid fresh human PurchaseConfirmation.
Refuse a charge that requires human confirmation when none is provided.
Refuse a charge whose PurchaseConfirmation was not signed by the principal (forged).
Settle a streaming session's accrued total at close within the committed budget.
Refuse an accrual that would exceed the committed session budget.
Honour a mid-session budget extension and settle the larger total.
Meter pay-per-token usage and settle the accrued total at close.
Meter a general usage session and settle the accrued total at close.
Accept a payment authorized by an imported AP2 mandate within its bounds.
Apply the imported mandate's limits: refuse an over-cap charge under it.
Accept a human-present charge under an imported mandate with valid confirmation.
Refuse a human-present charge under an imported mandate when confirmation is missing.
Process a full voluntary refund, moving the funds back to the payer.
Process a partial refund within the settled amount.
Refuse a refund larger than the original settlement (over-refund).
Execute a chargeback reversal when a dispute is upheld by the arbiter.
Refuse a reversal when there is no upheld resolution to charge back against.
Handle a withdrawn dispute with no value movement.
Settle directly on an EVM stablecoin rail to a did:pkh payee.
Settle via x402 to an account proven by a PayeeAccountBinding.
Refuse settlement to an account not bound to the payee's DID (account redirection).
Refuse a settlement proof that has not reached the rail's finality threshold.
Refuse a settlement proof whose amount or binding does not match the instruction.
Settle through a Lightning hold-invoice escrow and release on delivery.
Refund an EVM escrow to the payer on timeout.
Execute an on-chain reversal (compensating transfer with payer/payee swapped).
Settle over a card rail through a processor (Stripe) using authorize-then-capture, accepting a payee-attested SettlementProof.
Settle over an instant bank credit-transfer rail (RTP/FedNow) with a payee-attested SettlementProof.
Refuse a closed-processor settlement whose processor account is not bound to the payee DID (anti-redirection).
Settle over the PayPal wallet rail (immediate capture) with a payee-attested SettlementProof (capture COMPLETED).
